{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = God’s Eye
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[God’s Eye]] had replaced the sun.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c2">''The Captain'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator was once strapped to a chair staring into [[God’s Eye]] during a ritual.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
